title: Top 10 Highest Rated Movies of 2025 on Letterboxd, Ranked
text:
Top 10 highest-rated movies of 2025 on Letterboxd, the community film platform:

The Rankings:

#1: Chainsaw Man – The Movie: Reze Arc. This Japanese animated adaptation from MAPPA continues the anime series with fluid and high-energy animation showcasing a complicated romance between protagonist Denji and character Reze.

#2: The Voice of Hind Rajab. A Tunisian-French docudrama that received a standing ovation at the Venice Film Festival for its powerful portrayal of tragic events in Gaza.

#3: Marty Supreme. Timothée Chalamet stars as an ambitious table tennis player in this A24 film that some critics called the best work of his career.

#4: One Battle After Another. Paul Thomas Anderson's action comedy features Leonardo DiCaprio and is considered a frontrunner for the Oscars.

#5: I Swear. A biographical drama about John Davidson with Tourette's syndrome, earning perfect critical scores.

#6-10: Sentimental Value, Hamnet, No Other Choice, Sinners, and Train Dreams round out the top ten, representing diverse genres from drama to horror to period pieces.

Note: Letterboxd's highly-rated films tend to emphasize artistic merit and critical acclaime rather than commercial box office success, representing a different audience demographic than mainstream commercial cinema.
